title: Silicone Remover Tool 5 in 1 Caulking Tool Kit, Sealant Finishing Removal Kit with Scraper & 6 Replaceable Pads, Versatile Reusable Easy Efficient Grout Remover for Bathrooms Kitchens Floors Caulking
features: 【5-IN-1 SILICONE REMOVER TOOL】: This versatile silicone remover tool combines five essential functions for removing, smoothing and reapplying sealant. Designed for quick caulking, cleaning and finishing, it helps eliminate old silicone and restore clean, smooth seams on tiles, sinks and bathtubs.

【STURDY STAINLESS STEEL BLADE】: Built with a durable metal scraper head, this caulking tool easily cuts through hardened sealant or grout without scratching surfaces. The rust-resistant stainless steel and high-strength plastic handle ensure lasting durability for home and professional use.

【PORTABLE SIZE DESIGN】: Measuring approximately 19 cm in length, this compact sealant remover tool fits comfortably in your hand and is easy to carry in a toolbox or pocket. Lightweight yet sturdy, it provides effortless control when working on tight corners or narrow edges.

【REPLACEABLE SILICONE PADS】: Includes multiple silicone scraper heads for different sealing angles, allowing precise and bubble-free finishing. The easy-swap design lets you quickly change pads to achieve smooth, professional results across various caulking and silicone finishing tasks.

【IDEAL FOR MULTIPLE SURFACES】: Perfect for bathrooms, kitchens, windows, floors and car trims, this silicone tool finishing kit is suitable for removing old grout, cleaning caulk residue and smoothing new sealant lines. An essential tool for DIY projects, renovation work and daily maintenance.
description: Perfect your sealing work with this 5-in-1 Silicone Remover Tool Kit, combining a stainless steel scraper and interchangeable silicone pads for effortless caulk removal, grout cleaning, and sealant finishing. Compact and easy to control, the 19 cm tool removes old sealant without damaging tiles or glass, then smooths new lines for a flawless, bubble-free finish. Durable, rust-proof, and reusable, it’s ideal for bathrooms, kitchens, windows, floors, and car trims. Simply scrape, smooth, and renew – achieve clean, professional results with every use.
